title: Megalastrum yungense
intro: Megalastrum yungense, also known as Yungas fern, is a type of plant belonging to the fern family (Ophioglossaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Megalastrum yungense is typically used to make herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, fever, and other minor health issues.
